text: Welcome to Five Parsecs Campaign Manager! This app helps you run your Five Parsecs From Home campaigns digitally — track crew, resolve battles, and manage your campaign turn by turn.
Start here to create your first campaign. You'll choose difficulty, create your captain, recruit crew, and generate your starting world.
The Compendium lets you browse weapons, enemies, species, and game rules anytime — even without an active campaign.
Adjust display settings, accessibility options, and manage your data here. You can always replay this tutorial from Settings.
